name: Microsoft Security Copilot Masterclass: AI in Cybersecurity
description:
Want to know how AI is transforming modern cybersecurity operations?
Discover how Microsoft Security Copilot uses AI-powered insights to simplify threat investigation, accelerate incident response, and improve Security Operations Center efficiency.
**Date:** June 11, 2026
**Time:** 10AM- 12PM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-copilot-for-security-masterclass?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes)**

Learn how tools like Microsoft Microsoft Security Copilot, Microsoft Defender, Microsoft Sentinel, Microsoft 365, and Microsoft Intune are enabling organizations to strengthen security operations, improve threat intelligence, automate incident response, and enhance collaboration across the cybersecurity ecosystem.

**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* Introduction of Microsoft Copilot for Security
* Understanding Generative AI in Cybersecurity
* Key Features and Capabilities of Copilot for Security
* Using Copilot for Threat Detection and Investigation
* Improving Security Operations with AI-Powered Insights
* Q & A

**[Register Today](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-copilot-for-security-masterclass?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes)** and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass!!

name: The Retention ATM: Fix the Leaks Before You Lose Your Team
description: Are you leading a high-performing team — or quietly losing one? Join Dr. Tonicia Freeman-Foster as she reveals the everyday leadership habits that drain team trust and shows you exactly how to fix them.

name: Exclusive Complimentary Webinar: Master Hybrid Project Management
description:
Project management is evolving. Organizations today need the flexibility of Agile and the structure of Predictive approaches to deliver successful outcomes in an increasingly complex business environment.

[Join this exclusive complimentary webinar](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/hybrid-project-management-agile-predictive-strategies?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=pmi_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=sks) to discover how leading organizations are leveraging Hybrid Project Management to improve delivery speed, strengthen governance, enhance stakeholder engagement, and drive business value.

𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗬𝗼𝘂'𝗹𝗹 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗲:
• Why Hybrid Project Management is becoming the new enterprise standard
• How Agile and Predictive methodologies work together to improve outcomes
• Emerging project management trends shaping the future of work
• In-demand certifications including PMP®, PMI-ACP®, CAPM®, and PgMP®
• Career growth opportunities for modern project professionals.

Seats are limited. Register now to secure your place -[ Link](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/hybrid-project-management-agile-predictive-strategies?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=pmi_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=sks)

Discover what the future of project management looks like-and how you can position yourself for success in a rapidly changing business landscape.

name: AI+ Executive Masterclass: AI Strategy, Business Use Cases & Leadership
description:
Artificial Intelligence is becoming a key driver of business innovation, operational efficiency, and competitive advantage. As organizations accelerate AI adoption, leaders need practical strategies to identify opportunities, implement solutions, and drive measurable business outcomes.

In this AI+ Executive Masterclass, you'll explore how Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Generative AI are transforming modern organizations. Learn how businesses are leveraging AI to improve decision-making, streamline operations, enhance customer experiences, and increase workforce productivity through real-world use cases and practical implementation frameworks.

The session will also cover AI strategy, Responsible AI, governance, risk management, and key considerations for successful enterprise AI adoption. Gain actionable insights to help lead AI-driven transformation and create long-term business value.

**[Register now to learn how AI can drive innovation, efficiency, and sustainable growth across your organization.](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/ai_executive_masterclass_ai_strategy_business_use_cases_and_leadership?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aicerts_fy26_q2&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=at)**

name: The Users You’re Missing: Research Tips for Project Managers
description: Who are the users your project may be overlooking? Join Dr. Starlynne Gornail for a practical session on using human-centered research strategies to uncover unmet user needs and create more effective, trusted solutions.
